heading: Conduct of proceedings
label: 44106 Conduct of proceedings
text: Part A of this subtitle applies to proceedings conducted by the Federal Maritime Commission under this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4410646 App.:817d(d)., §§ 2(d), 3(d), , , 1358; , , .Pub. L. 89–77780 Stat. 1357Pub. L. 104–324, title VII, § 746(c)110 Stat. 3943Nov. 6, 1966Oct. 19, 199646 App.:817e(d).The authority to prescribe regulations is omitted as unnecessary because it is already provided by section 305 of the revised title.
